component.summary: Shows OAuth connection status and sign-in actions for a chosen provider, using results from upstream Greentic OAuth operations and the provider extension.
component.details: Use this component when a flow needs to display OAuth state after separate Greentic OAuth operations have checked for tokens, refreshed access tokens, or exchanged an authorization code. This component does not import the OAuth broker directly. Instead, the flow passes in current_token, consent_url, exchanged_token, or oauth_error from greentic-oauth operations. The Greentic OAuth provider extension still needs to be installed and configured for the chosen provider ID.
component.use_case.status_card: Display whether a user already has a usable token for Microsoft, Google, GitHub, or another OAuth service after an upstream Greentic OAuth operation checked token availability.
component.use_case.ensure_token: Block flow progress unless an upstream Greentic OAuth operation supplied a usable token or a consent URL for reauthentication.
component.use_case.complete_sign_in: Finish a sign-in UI step after a separate Greentic OAuth operation exchanged the authorization code and returned a new token set or an error.
component.operation.oauth_card.handle_me: Run the OAuth card workflow for one request.
component.operation.component_info.summa: Return a localized explanation of the component and its operations.
component.operation.qa_spec.summary: Return setup, update, and remove questions for configuration forms.
component.operation.apply_answers.summar: Turn setup answers into saved component configuration.
component.operation.i18n_keys.summary: List all translation keys the component uses.
qa.setup.title: Configure OAuth card
qa.setup.description: Provide the default OAuth provider settings for this component.
qa.update.title: Update OAuth card configuration
qa.update.description: Change the provider defaults used by the oauth-card component.
qa.remove.title: Remove OAuth card configuration
qa.remove.description: Confirm removal of the configured oauth-card defaults.
qa.field.provider_id.label: Provider ID
qa.field.provider_id.help: OAuth provider identifier exposed by the installed Greentic OAuth provider extension and used by upstream Greentic OAuth operations, for example `msgraph` or `github`.
qa.field.default_subject.label: Default subject
qa.field.default_subject.help: Optional fallback subject when invoke payloads omit `subject`.
qa.field.scopes_csv.label: Default scopes
qa.field.scopes_csv.help: Comma-separated OAuth scopes to apply when callers do not pass `scopes`.
qa.field.tenant.label: Tenant
qa.field.tenant.help: Optional tenant context echoed into auth output.
qa.field.team.label: Team
qa.field.team.help: Optional team context echoed into auth output.
qa.field.redirect_path.label: Redirect path
qa.field.allow_auto_sign_in.label: Allow auto sign-in
qa.field.allow_auto_sign_in.help: When enabled, `ensure-token` returns a sign-in card automatically if no token exists.
qa.field.confirm_remove.label: Confirm removal
qa.field.confirm_remove.help: Set this to true to approve removing the saved oauth-card defaults.
qa.error.required: One or more required fields are missing.
